description_long: This bungalow features a modern, boxy design with clean lines and a mix of large glass windows and horizontal siding. The front facade includes a prominent entry door, a wall-mounted light fixture, and a wide porch area with outdoor seating. The structure is single-story, with a flat roof and a combination of white and gray exterior finishes. Expansive windows wrap around the living spaces, allowing for ample natural light and views into the interior, which is partially visible and includes contemporary furnishings. The rear and side elevations are more private, with fewer windows and a solid wall section. The overall aesthetic is minimalist and urban, suitable for a city neighborhood or suburban street.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large glass windows, and a wide front porch. The exterior features clean lines, white and gray siding, and contemporary design elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wide porch, outdoor bench, and large windows revealing the living area.
description_view_1: Rear view with a mostly solid wall, minimal windows, and a bench on the patio area.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the extensive glass facade, visible interior furnishings, and the full width of the porch.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a mix of solid siding and a single window, plus a glimpse of the patterned interior wall.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on the front and side
